title: FIRST VIEW
body: Project Browser → right-click Perspective → Views → New View. Drag-and-drop canvas. Add components, bind to tags.
code:
Simple Overview:

1. Create view: "TankOverview"
2. Add Label
   Props → text: "Tank TK-101"
3. Add Numeric Display
   Drag Plant/TK101/Level onto it
   (auto-creates binding)
4. Add Linear Scale
   Bind value → {Plant/TK101/Level}
5. Add LED Display
   Bind value → {Plant/TK101/InletValve/Open}

Save → Publish → open in browser
key: Drag tags from Tag Browser → drop on component
Save AND Publish to make changes live
mistakes: Vision components in a Perspective project
